messages.message: Weather for Seattle, Washington, United States: 12C and overcast. Top headline: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'. Tech update: Sam Altman’s project World looks to scale its human verification empire. First stop: Tinder.. STEM feature: Scientists discover bacteria can “explode” to spread antibiotic resistance.
